axioms.name: Intuition plurality
axioms.statement: Any bounded system generates multiple intuition markers across competing basins.

axioms.name: Authority assignment
axioms.statement: Judgment assigns authority A to a subset of intuition markers, producing an executable route.

axioms.name: Irreversibility threshold
axioms.statement: If revision cost exceeds the update budget, authority becomes effectively irreversible.

axioms.name: Two failure modes
axioms.statement: Over-authority yields closure; under-authority yields drift.

axioms.name: Open persistence
axioms.statement: Sustained openness requires periodic authority re-editing triggered by conflict, error, or external perturbation.

scope_note: Axioms are substrate-agnostic and apply to individual cognition, organizations, and AI systems where multiple basins exist and authority can become costly to revise.
